audit_status.source_base: Greek 2 Peter text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact draft reviewed for divine power, participation in divine nature, virtue chain, eyewitness of majesty, prophetic word.

verses.restored: Simon Peter, servant and apostle of Jesus Messiah, to those receiving equally precious trust with us in righteousness/justice of our Divine and Savior Jesus Messiah:
Grace to you and peace be multiplied in knowledge of the Divine and of Jesus our Lord.
As his divine power has granted to us all things toward life and reverence/godliness, through knowledge of the One calling us by his own glory and excellence,
through which he has granted to us precious and very great promises, so that through these you may become partners of divine nature, escaping the corruption in the world by desire.
And for this very reason, bringing in all eagerness, supply in your trust excellence, and in excellence knowledge,
and in knowledge self-control, and in self-control endurance, and in endurance reverence/godliness,
and in reverence/godliness sibling-love, and in sibling-love love.
For these things being present and increasing in you make you neither idle nor unfruitful into knowledge of our Lord Jesus Messiah.
For the one in whom these things are not present is blind, being nearsighted, having received forgetfulness of cleansing of former sins/misalignments.
Therefore, siblings, be more eager to make firm your calling and choosing, for doing these things you will certainly not stumble.
For so the entrance into the age-long reign of our Lord and Savior Jesus Messiah will be richly supplied to you.
Therefore I will always be ready to remind you concerning these things, though you know and have been established in the present truth.
But I consider it righteous/just, as long as I am in this tent/body, to awaken you by reminder,
knowing that the putting off of my tent/body is soon, as also our Lord Jesus Messiah made clear to me.
And I will be eager that at every time after my departure you may have remembrance of these things.
For we did not follow cleverly devised myths when making known to you the power and presence/arrival of our Lord Jesus Messiah, but became eyewitnesses of that one's majesty.
For receiving from Divine Father honor and glory, a voice such as this was borne to him by the magnificent glory: This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased.
And this voice we heard borne from heaven, being with him on the holy mountain.
And we have the prophetic word more firm, to which you do beautifully to pay attention as to a lamp shining in a dark place, until day dawns and morning star rises in your hearts.
Knowing this first, that no prophecy of Scripture comes from one's own release/interpretation,
for prophecy was not ever brought by human will, but humans spoke from Divine being carried by holy Spirit.

translation_notes: Partners of divine nature preserves the participatory mystical language without collapsing Creator/creature distinction.
Transfiguration witness grounds the prophetic word as lamp until morning star rises in hearts.
